title: CREATE INDEX changes the answer
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(x INTEGER, y TEXT, z DOUBLE PRECISION);
INSERT INTO t2(x, y, z) VALUES(100, 'abc', 1.5), (200, 'def', NULL);
SELECT MIN(x) FROM t2 WHERE y='abc' AND z IS NOT NULL;
CREATE INDEX t2yz ON t2(y, z);
SELECT MIN(x) FROM t2 WHERE y='abc' AND z IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: CREATE INDEX changes the result of min() function
